FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct LaidCluster

Namespace
FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite
Assembly
FluentGpu.Text.DirectWrite.dll

Source mapping for one laid glyph — the hit-test companion to LaidGlyph (parallel to Glyphs minus the synthetic trim ellipsis): the UTF-16 index of the cluster's first source char (taken from the shaper's cluster map, never re-derived from char counts), the glyph's leading pen X and advance on its line, and its line index. Entries are stored in the VISUAL order glyphs were placed (after BiDi L2 reordering), so an in-order scan walks the line left→right.

public readonly struct LaidCluster

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
